items.title: Trump threatens to block opening of US-Canada bridge
items.description: Prime Minister Mark Carney said on Tuesday he had a "positive" talk with Trump following the Gordie Howe International Bridge threat.

items.title: Buddhist monks' 108-day Walk for Peace set to end in Washington DC
items.description: Nineteen monks have walked single file from Texas to Washington DC, silently advocating for more peace in the US.

items.title: Marc Anthony says the way Beckham feud has played out is 'hardly the truth'
items.description: The 57-year-old performed at Brooklyn and Nicola Peltz Beckham's wedding reception in 2022.

items.title: US lawmakers accuse justice department of 'inappropriately' redacting Epstein files
items.description: Republican Thomas Massie and Democrat Ro Khanna say the DOJ is not complying with their transparency law.

items.title: As a fellow Puerto Rican, Bad Bunny's Super Bowl show was personal
items.description: While the performance carried a message of unity for Latinos in general, the artist sang for the island we are both from, writes BBC Mundo's Ronald Áv...
